subcodes.first_line: O leaf of the Divine Lote-Tree! Through the loving-kindness of the Sovereign of Oneness, mayest thou be joyous and radiant in all circumstances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه سدره انشاء الله بعنایت سلطان احدیه مسرور و خرم باشی و در کل احوال
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
